config module¶

Project configuration.

Keep compute low on Orin Nano: - start with 640x480 @ 30 fps - grayscale IR (1 channel) is cheaper than BGR

class config.AppConfig(video: 'VideoConfig', webrtc: 'WebRtcConfig', ipc: 'IpcConfig', logging: 'LoggingConfig')¶

Bases: object

video: VideoConfig¶
webrtc: WebRtcConfig¶

class config.VideoConfig(width: int = 640, height: int = 480, source: str = 'color', fps: int = 30, ring_size: int = 4)¶

Bases: object

Video/capture settings.

Invalid values fail fast via __post_init__ validation.

property channels: int¶
fps: int = 30¶
height: int = 480¶
ring_size: int = 4¶
source: str = 'color'¶
width: int = 640¶
class config.WebRtcConfig(signaling_path: str = '/ws/webrtc', preferred_video_codec: str | None = 'vp8', quality_profile: str = 'low', max_bitrate_bps: int | None = None, min_bitrate_bps: int | None = None, start_bitrate_bps: int | None = None, max_framerate: float | None = None, scale_resolution_down_by: float = 1.0)¶

Bases: object

WebRTC sender settings for the FastAPI bridge.
